subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Ella Mamelok
body:
Hi Ella Mamelok,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at Dalloway Partners. Would love to swap notes on Tech, services, Potential Investor, Stage: Seed.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]


--- CONTEXT FOR LIGHTFERN (remove before sending) ---
Context for Lightfern (delete before sending):
Warmth sends scoring + lead data here so Lightfern can populate the
follow-up in Gmail. Human reviews/polishes in Gmail, then sends.

CLIENT:

  sender_name: Warmth
interests: Tech, services, Potential Investor, Stage: Seed
